steps.title: Identify the structures on each side of the blank
steps.content: To the left of the blank we have the compound noun object “hotels and ______” of the gerund “visiting.” To the right begins the subordinate clause “as it grew in scope and influence…”, which provides essential timing information for the main clause that follows.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content: No punctuation is required between a noun phrase and an essential subordinate clause, so the blank should simply be “restaurants.” The other options insert a semicolon, a comma, or an extra “and,” which either creates a faulty break or an ungrammatical repetition. That matches choice A — A is correct.
